The question is asking which one you cannot judge by. The options are A (where he was born), B, C, or D. The passage doesn't mention anything about where someone is born as a factor. The factors listed are accent (which relates to speech, B), education, family background, clothes (C), interests (D), etc. So the one that's not mentioned is where he was born (A).
